subcodes.first_line: O myrtle of the garden of mystic enlightenment, all garments and raiments woven by the hand of possibility and fashioned by the fingers of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ریحان گلستان عرفان جمیع جامه و قمیص که دست امکان نسج نموده و انامل حیز
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
